mapper.sql: select c.accounting_id, c.dept_id, c.accounting_no, c.start_date, c.end_date, c.total_expense, c.total_purchase, c.total_sale, c.total_payment, c.total_invest, c.current_advance, c.return_situation, c.del_flag, c.create_by, c.create_time, c.update_by, c.update_time, c.remark from fin_cost_accounting c
mapper.select:
c.del_flag = '0' and c.dept_id = #{deptId} and c.accounting_no like concat('%', #{accountingNo}, '%')
order by c.create_time desc
select count(*) from fin_cost_accounting where date(create_time) = curdate()
select ifnull(sum(expense_amount), 0) from fin_expense where del_flag = '0'
select ifnull(sum(total_amount), 0) from fin_purchase where del_flag = '0'
select ifnull(sum(sale_amount), 0) from fin_sale_record where del_flag = '0'
select ifnull(sum(payment_amount), 0) from fin_sale_payment where del_flag = '0'
select ifnull(sum(invest_amount), 0) from fin_invest_record where del_flag = '0'
select ifnull(sum(advance_amount), 0) from fin_advance where status = '0' and del_flag = '0'
select ifnull(sum(expense_amount), 0) from fin_expense where del_flag = '0' and expense_date between #{startDate} and concat(#{endDate}, ' 23:59:59')
select ifnull(sum(total_amount), 0) from fin_purchase where del_flag = '0' and purchase_date between #{startDate} and concat(#{endDate}, ' 23:59:59')
select ifnull(sum(sale_amount), 0) from fin_sale_record where del_flag = '0' and sale_date between #{startDate} and concat(#{endDate}, ' 23:59:59')
select ifnull(sum(payment_amount), 0) from fin_sale_payment where del_flag = '0' and payment_date between #{startDate} and concat(#{endDate}, ' 23:59:59')
select ifnull(sum(invest_amount), 0) from fin_invest_record where del_flag = '0' and invest_time between #{startDate} and concat(#{endDate}, ' 23:59:59')
mapper.insert:
insert into fin_cost_accounting
dept_id, accounting_no, start_date, end_date, total_expense, total_purchase, total_sale, total_payment, total_invest, current_advance, return_situation, del_flag, create_by, create_time, remark,
#{deptId}, #{accountingNo}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{totalExpense}, #{totalPurchase}, #{totalSale}, #{totalPayment}, #{totalInvest}, #{currentAdvance}, #{returnSituation}, #{delFlag}, #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{remark},
mapper.select: select exists ( select 1 from fin_cost_accounting where return_situation >= 0 and del_flag = '0' limit 1 )
mapper.delete: update fin_cost_accounting set del_flag = '2' where accounting_id = #{accountingId}

update fin_cost_accounting set del_flag = '2' where accounting_id in
#{accountingId}
